title: fix network restart always test
body:
The added test in 30544f225e73 is flaking. Podman inspect is always
working so we have to check the pid instead.

comments.body: @edsantiago PTAL, the log from the flake: https://storage.googleapis.com/cirrus-ci-6707778565701632-fcae48/artifacts/containers/podman/4680692446527488/html/sys-podman-ubuntu-2010-root-host.log.html
